pages.description: Signup page, hooks, and components for user registration and display name generation.

pages.description: User settings page, session hooks, and GitHub identity utilities.

pages.description: Similarity graph components, hooks, utilities, and clustering algorithms.

pages.title: Jobs Subsystem
pages.description: Job listing, filtering, detail views, and matching candidate components.

pages.description: Interview module with hooks, components, constants, and styles for interview features.

pages.description: Decision making features including job matching, decision trees, and UI components.

pages.description: Dashboard page, components, hooks, and utilities for user metrics and stats.

pages.description: Landing page components and feature data for the main entry point.

pages.description: API route handlers and utilities for authentication, resumes, jobs, pathways, chat, and reports.

pages.description: Error classes, utilities, and templates for error reporting and handling.

pages.description: Activity logging, toast messages, and utilities for user and system activity tracking.

pages.description: Components and utilities for generating job-related reports and analytics.
